- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot

- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9

- 6.31.1
pin_run_as_build:
  python:

python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
rust_compiler:
- rust
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version

name: chromadb

about.description:
Chroma is the open-source embedding database. Chroma makes it easy to build
LLM apps by making knowledge, facts, and skills pluggable for LLMs.
about.summary: Chroma: The AI-native open-source embedding database

about.description:
Chroma is the open-source embedding database. Chroma makes it easy to build
LLM apps by making knowledge, facts, and skills pluggable for LLMs.
about.summary: Chroma: The AI-native open-source embedding database

raw_meta_yaml:
context:
  name: chromadb
  version: "1.5.7"

package:
  name: ${{ name | lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  - url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/${{ name[0] }}/${{ name }}/chromadb-${{ version }}.tar.gz
    sha256: 9c4b01d164c088c42945795177fe6ec3a1447f0f23fdaaefff771cdc119e3d8e
    patches:
      - 0001-raise-chroma-segment-recursion-limit.patch
  - url: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chroma-core/chroma/refs/tags/${{ version }}/LICENSE
    sha256: c71d239df91726fc519c6eb72d318ec65820627232b2f796219e87dcf35d0ab4
    file_name: LICENSE

build:
  number: 0
  script:
    - cargo-bundle-licenses --format yaml --output THIRDPARTY.yml
    - ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
    - ${{ compiler('rust') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
    - cargo-bundle-licenses
    - libprotobuf
    - make
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - maturin >=1.0,<2.0
  host:
    - python
    - maturin >=1.0,<2.0
    - setuptools >=61.0
    - setuptools-scm >=6.2
    - pip
  run:
    - python
    - bcrypt >=4.0.1
    - fastapi ==0.115.9
    - graphlib-backport >=1.0.3
    - grpcio >=1.58.0
    - httpx >=0.27.0
    - importlib-resources
    - jsonschema >=4.19.0
    - mmh3 >=4.0.1
    - numpy >=1.22.5
    - onnxruntime >=1.14.1
    - opentelemetry-api >=1.2.0
    - opentelemetry-exporter-otlp-proto-grpc >=1.2.0
    - opentelemetry-instrumentation-fastapi >=0.41b0
    - opentelemetry-sdk >=1.2.0
    - orjson >=3.9.12
    - overrides >=7.3.1
    - posthog >=2.4.0,<6.0.0
    - pulsar-client >=3.1.0
    - pybase64 >=1.4.1
    - pydantic >=2.0
    - pydantic-settings >=2.0
    - pypika >=0.48.9
    - python-build >=1.0.3
    - python-kubernetes >=28.1.0
    - pyyaml >=6.0.0
    - requests >=2.28
    - rich >=10.11.0
    - tenacity >=8.2.3
    - tokenizers >=0.13.2
    - tqdm >=4.65.0
    - typer >=0.9.0
    - typing_extensions >=4.5.0
    - uvicorn >=0.18.3
    - uvicorn-standard >=0.18.3

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - chromadb
  - requirements:
      run:
        - pip
    script:
      - pip check

about:
  homepage: https://www.trychroma.com/
  summary: "Chroma: The AI-native open-source embedding database"
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file:
    - LICENSE
    - THIRDPARTY.yml
  description: |
    Chroma is the open-source embedding database. Chroma makes it easy to build
    LLM apps by making knowledge, facts, and skills pluggable for LLMs.
  repository: https://github.com/chroma-core/chroma
  documentation: https://docs.trychroma.com/

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - sugatoray
    - xhochy
    - pavelzw

about.description:
Chroma is the open-source embedding database. Chroma makes it easy to build
LLM apps by making knowledge, facts, and skills pluggable for LLMs.
about.summary: Chroma: The AI-native open-source embedding database
